name: DataTable
description: A feature-rich data table component built on TanStack Table with sorting, pagination, row selection, loading states, and skeleton loading support.
usage_guidelines: Use for displaying and managing tabular data with advanced features.
Define columns using TanStack Table ColumnDef format.
Enable selectable for row selection with checkboxes.
Handle sorting, pagination, and selection via callbacks.
Use loading prop to show skeleton or overlay loading states.

data.description: Array of data objects to display.

loading.description: Shows loading state (skeleton for empty, overlay for populated).

noData.description: Shows no data message when true.

onSort.description: Callback fired when column sorting changes.

onPageSizeChange.description: Callback fired when page size changes.

onRowSelect.description: Callback fired when individual row is selected.

onAllRowSelect.description: Callback fired when all rows are selected/deselected.

skeletonAvatarColumns.description: Column indices that should show avatar skeletons.

styling_info.visual_description: Full-featured table with sortable columns, row selection checkboxes, pagination controls, and page size selector. Shows skeleton loading for empty state and overlay loading for populated state.

Do: Handle all callback props for interactivity
Define column widths for better layout
Dont: Don't forget to handle sorting callback
Don't use client-side pagination for large datasets
Don't forget to reset selection on data changes

Basic.title: Basic

Checkable.title: Checkable

Query.title: Query
